then.echo: Error: Check release notes for availability on your database type
then.fail: Error: The upgrade script: drop-audit-tables-${dbType}.sql was not found

target.name: init-js-db-pro
target.description: run ddl on pro jasperserver db

target.name: init-audit-db-pro
target.description: run ddl on pro audit db

target.name: init-js-db-ce
target.description: run ddl on ce jasperserver db

then.fail: Error: The upgrade script: upgrade-${dbType}-5.2.0-5.5.0-pro.sql or upgrade-${dbType}-5.2.0-5.5.0-pro.plsql was not found

property.name: 7.1-standard-upgrade-message
property.value: ${line.separator}WARNING: legacy dashboards (prior to release 7.1) are no longer supported and will be skipped during the import operation.${line.separator}${line.separator}

then.echo: Error: Check release notes for availability on your database type
then.fail: Error: The upgrade script: upgrade-${dbType}-7.1.0-7.2.0-pro.sql or upgrade-${dbType}-7.1.0-7.2.0-pro.plsql was not found

property.name: upgradeWarningMessage
property.value: Legacy dashboards prior to release 7.1 are no longer supported and will be removed during the upgrade operation. Do you want to continue upgrade? WARNING: All existing Legacy Dashboards will be lost! This operation may not be rolled back. Enter 'y' to continue or 'n' to cancel the upgrade operation. Default is 'n'

then.echo: Error: Check release notes for availability on your database type
then.fail: Error: The upgrade script: upgrade-${dbType}-6.3.0-6.4.0-pro.sql or upgrade-${dbType}-6.3.0-6.4.0-pro.plsql was not found

target.name: upgrade-for-overlay-pro
target.description: internal upgrade task used by overlay install

then.echo: Error: Check release notes for availability on your database type
then.fail: Error: The upgrade script: upgrade-${dbType}-${fromVersion}-${toVersion}-pro.sql or upgrade-${dbType}-${fromVersion}-${toVersion}-pro.plsql was not found

attribute.name: upgradeWarningMessage
attribute.default: This operation may not be rolled back. Enter 'y' to continue or 'n' to cancel the upgrade operation. Default is 'n'

then.echo: Error: Neither of the following paths could be found:
Error: Check release notes for availability on your database type
then.fail: Error: The upgrade script: ${sqlFile} or ${plsqlFile} was not found

target.name: upgrade-minimal-ce
target.description: Performs minimal upgrade of JasperServer CE (no sample data)
target.depends: check-install-type-ce, set-minimal-mode, gen-config, pre-upgrade-test-ce, upgrade-js-ce-db-minimal, deploy-webapp-ce-if-needed

target.name: upgrade-minimal-pro
target.description: Performs minimal upgrade of JasperServer Pro (no sample data)

target.name: upgrade-normal-ce
target.description: Performs normal upgrade of JasperServer CE (with sample data)

target.name: upgrade-normal-pro
target.description: Performs normal upgrade of JasperServer Pro (with sample data)

target.name: migrate-split-pro
target.description: Performs migrate of JasperServer Pro from Compact to Split

target.name: db-dump-create
target.description: creates a database backup for use by QA

then.fail: Error: The appServerType property needs to be set to a value
Error: App server root directory ${fixedAppServerDir} not found!

else.fail: Error: Unable to determine type of app server from ${appServerType}!

then.fail: Post-creation check for ${displayNameOfDBToRecreate} database failed: [${nameOfDBForDBMSToRecreate}] database doesn't exist

input.message: Database [${nameOfDBForDBMSToRecreate}] already exists. Drop it and create new? WARNING: All existing data will be lost! This operation may not be rolled back. Enter 'y' to recreate or 'n' to skip this step. Default is 'n'

else.echo: Database recreation skipped. Leaving database intact

then.fail: Post-creation check for ${displayNameOfDBToRecreate} database failed: [${nameOfDBForDBMSToRecreate}] database doesn't exist

target.name: prepare-all-ce-dbs-normal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer CE, FoodMart and SugarCRM databases

target.name: prepare-all-pro-dbs-normal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer Pro, FoodMart and SugarCRM databases

target.name: prepare-js-ce-db-minimal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer CE (no sample data) database

target.name: prepare-js-pro-db-minimal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer Pro (no sample data) database

target.name: prepare-js-ce-db-normal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer CE database

target.name: prepare-js-pro-db-normal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer Pro database

target.name: prepare-audit-pro-db-normal
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer Pro database

target.name: create-load-all-dbs-ce
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer CE, FoodMart and SugarCRM databases

target.name: create-load-all-dbs-pro
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer Pro, FoodMart and SugarCRM databases

target.name: create-load-js-db-ce
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer CE (no sample data) database

target.name: create-load-js-db-pro
target.description: Recreates and fills/loads JasperServer Pro (no sample data) database

target.name: fill-js-ce-db-minimal
target.description: Creates data definition for JasperServer CE database and loads minimal data into the database

input.message: Database ${js.dbName} was not recreated. Create repository data? Enter 'y' to create or 'n' to skip this step. Default is 'n'

target.name: fill-js-pro-db-minimal
target.description: Creates data definition for JasperServer Pro database and loads minimal data into the database

target.name: fill-audit-pro-db-minimal
target.description: Creates data definition for Audit Pro database and loads minimal data into the database

target.name: fill-js-ce-db-normal
target.description: Creates data definition for JasperServer CE database and loads sample data into the database

input.message: Database ${js.dbName} was not recreated. Create repository data? Enter 'y' to create or 'n' to skip this step. Default is 'n'

target.name: fill-js-pro-db-normal
target.description: Creates data definition for JasperServer Pro database and loads sample data into the database

target.name: fill-audit-pro-db-normal
target.description: Creates data definition for Audit Pro database and loads sample data into the database

target.name: expire-users-passwords
target.description: Expiring users passwords in repository db

target.name: fill-foodmart-db
target.description: Creates data definition for FoodMart database and loads sample data into the database

input.message: Database ${foodmart.dbName} was not recreated. Create data? Enter 'y' to create or 'n' to skip this step. Default is 'n'

target.name: fill-sugarcrm-db
target.description: Creates data definition for SugarCRM database and loads sample data into the database

input.message: Database ${sugarcrm.dbName} was not recreated. Create data? Enter 'y' to create or 'n' to skip this step. Default is 'n'
